title: The World Government’s Shadow

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: either way, it'll take all three of us out of commission.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if we don't land this, it's all over.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, rocks!! I dunno if there's any words that'll comfort you at this point!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't even know what's happened to you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But, I do know one thing!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is no time for tears, you dolt!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The world government tried their best to bury this incident in the shadows, however...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The disbanding of the chaotic crew...

dialogue.speaker: Rocks D. Xebec
dialogue.text: THE ROCKS PIRATES DESTABLIZED AN ENTIRE ERA...
